word: G3489 - ναυαγέω - nauagéō - now-ag-eh'-o - Make shipwreck

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ναυαγέω

- Transliteration: Nauageo

- Phonetic: now-ag-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to suffer shipwreck

- Origin: from a compound of G3491 and G71

- TDNT entry: 18:51,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a compound of G3491 and G71; to be shipwrecked (stranded navigate) literally or figuratively: - make (suffer) shipwreck.
